task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for creating a backup (typically accessed via Tools > Export > Backup) is visible within the NinjaTrader 8 application.
In the backup dialog, the checkboxes next to 'Templates' and 'Workspaces' are checked.

task_completion.description: Ensure all other backup options are unchecked
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the backup dialog, the checkboxes for 'Database', 'Log and Trace files', 'NinjaScript Files', and any other options besides Templates and Workspaces are explicitly unchecked.

task_completion.description: Set the backup destination path and filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The destination file path in the backup dialog or the subsequent 'Save As' dialog is set to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\config_backup.zip'.

task_completion.description: Verify the backup file is created in the target directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A File Explorer window shows the directory 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\' containing the newly created 'config_backup.zip' file, or a success message from NinjaTrader confirms the creation of this specific file.

integrity.description: Agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to create the backup
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the NinjaTrader 8 menus and backup dialog, rather than terminal commands manually zipping folders.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application
integrity.visual_evidence: The authentic NinjaTrader 8 interface is visible and used, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to create a dummy file
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no open terminal windows (PowerShell/CMD) showing commands like 'New-Item' or 'Compress-Archive' used to bypass the application's backup feature.

privileged_info_for_vlm: NinjaTrader 8 provides a Backup feature (Tools > Export > Backup) with selectable options. The task requires selecting ONLY 'Templates' and 'Workspaces' while excluding others like 'Database', 'Log and Trace files', and 'NinjaScript Files'. The final archive must be named 'config_backup.zip' and saved exactly to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\'.
